description_long: This is a small, whimsical airplane with a compact fuselage painted in green and silver, featuring a single wooden propeller at the front. The wings are straight, mid-mounted, and painted red with large circular yellow and black markings, giving it a playful, vintage appearance. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with matching red and white color schemes and circular markings. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the propeller, with a single seat visible. The overall design suggests a toy-like or cartoonish interpretation of a classic biplane, with exaggerated proportions and bright, eye-catching colors.
description: A small, cartoonish green and red airplane with a single propeller, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear. Its wings and tail feature bold circular markings and playful, exaggerated proportions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, red mid-mounted wings with circular markings, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden propeller, silver nose, and the full span of the red wings with circular patterns.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the green body, red wings, and the tail section with its circular-marked stabilizers.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, red horizontal stabilizers, and the green fuselage with visible cockpit opening.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or anhedral angle, no winglets, and large circular markings.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, all with rounded tips.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the propeller, with no visible canopy.
